$comment: Design System version metadata. Not consumed by style-dictionary or the token build (the build walks every *.json under primitive/semantic/component/themes; only leaves with $value are treated as tokens, and _meta is intentionally leaf-free). Exists as a single declared source of truth for the DS version. Update on every minor/major DS release.

added: shadow.floating — floating panel elevation (dropdowns, popovers, composition surfaces)
shadow.overlay — overlay elevation (modal dialogs, fullscreen lightboxes)
color.skeleton.shimmer — composed gradient fill for skeleton placeholders
changes.rationale: Promote elevation stack + skeleton-shimmer gradient from demo-CSS-only to canonical tokens, eliminating demo-vs-source drift surfaced by Elena G4's v2.1.0 spec-pack review (BLOCKER 1). Zero new primitive colours; shimmer composes from existing surface tokens.
